title: Bolsius - Fragrance Diffuser - Silent Night - 60 ml - Scent experience up to 6 weeks - Made with natural extracts
features: Transform your home with the Bolsius Silent Night reed diffuser and fill the room with a heartwarming blend of hazelnut, roasted almonds and vanilla. this reed diffuser guarantees the purest fragrance experience up to 6 weeks, thanks to our CleanScent technology, this technology is a unique combination of a plant-based formula used in our smartly designed bottle with excellently positioned natural rattan sticks, this product is made with a plant-based formula with natural extracts, the Silent Night collection includes candles in various sizes, reed diffusers and tealights

A soft, cozy blend of rich hazelnut, peanut, and warm almond, enhanced by a hint of spicy nutmeg at its heart, it rests gently on a soothing base of creamy oat milk and dark vanilla, transporting you to a serene snowy night in a winter wonderland

Bolsius True Glow reed diffuser is made with natural extracts, for up to 6 weeks, the spicy, warm aroma diffuses slowly through the room, filling it with a lasting fragrance, experience the enjoyment of festive fragrances in your home
True Glow exudes a comforting spicy aroma that creates a warm and welcoming atmosphere on cold winter days, this will help you enjoy the beautiful moments of being together even more

Since 1870, Bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home, we do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet, Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses, it's how you can make every moment a special one, for yourself and for everyone around you
description: Product Description Transform your home with the Bolsius Silent Night reed diffuser and fill the room with a heartwarming blend of hazelnut, roasted almonds and vanilla. This reed diffuser guarantees the purest fragrance experience up to 6 weeks, thanks to our CleanScent technology. This technology is a unique combination of a plant-based formula used in our smartly designed bottle with excellently positioned natural rattan sticks. This product is made with a plant-based formula with natural extracts. The Silent Night collection includes candles in various sizes, reed diffusers and tealights. Directions Insert the rattan sticks into the bottle and replace them as needed to maintain the scent. Safety Warning Place the product in a place where the fragrance can spread well, but not next to or on any sources of heat. Make sure you have a firm surface to prevent the product from falling over and keep it out of children's reach. You don't need to turn the sticks over. Did you know that your nose can get used to a certain fragrance and that you can no longer smell it yourself over time? It's therefore a good idea to switch fragrances regularly in your home so that you can continue to enjoy them at their best. See more
